summary: Plan-only inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Open non-security PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer/backlog handling; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, closure recommendations, or fix artifacts are emitted.

actions.reason: Useful active maintainer PR with unresolved review/dirty state; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this inventory shard.
